defaultJokes.setup: Why did the baseball team hire a musician?
defaultJokes.punchline: Because they needed a good pitch.

defaultJokes.setup: Why did the calendar bring a ladder?
defaultJokes.punchline: It wanted to get to the next date.

defaultJokes.setup: Why are teddy bears never hungry?
What do you call cheese that isn’t yours?

04-19: April 19 usually lands in the heart of spring, when days are getting noticeably longer across the U.S.
By April 19, the year is more than a quarter complete, but it still somehow feels like January was last week.
Around this point in April, sunset has already stretched well past winter's early-evening darkness in most places.
1897: The first Boston Marathon was run, launching one of the most famous races in the world.
1958: Montreal's Maurice Richard scored the final goal of his legendary NHL career.
1987: Michael Jordan dropped 61 points against the Atlanta Hawks during one of his early scoring explosions.
